get.description: **Intercepts a latlon or player query parameter**, resolves coordinates, rounds them to 3 places, and rewrites the request to the destination weather service.

parameters.name: latlon
parameters.description: The raw comma-separated coordinates (e.g., 32.46564,12.8737874). Optional when player is provided.

parameters.name: player
parameters.description: A Broadsign player ID resolved to latitude and longitude from the bundled player dataset. Optional when latlon is provided.

parameters.name: com.broadsign.suite.bsp.resource_id
parameters.description: An alias of player that resolves the same Broadsign player ID to latitude and longitude from the CSV dataset. Optional when latlon or player is provided.

parameters.name: debug
parameters.description: Optional debug flag. When set to true, the response includes a debug object with the original upstream OpenWeather URL, with the appid value masked. When false or omitted, debug is hidden.
